<br>

<img align="right" width="250" src="https://media.giphy.com/media/L1R1tvI9svkIWwpVYr/giphy.gif" alt="girl coding" />

second-year cs student at reva university, bangalore.
i build full-stack apps, break things at hackathons,
and spend an unreasonable amount of time making
ai do useful things instead of just vibing.

i like clean code, open problems, and the feeling
when something finally deploys without crying.

when i'm not coding i'm editing videos, exploring
new tech rabbit holes, or pretending i'll sleep early.

<br clear="right"/>

<div align="center">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="55%" />

<br><br>

### ✿ tools on my clothesline

<br>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="80%" alt="tech stack hanging on a clothesline" />

<sub>also: typescript · java · vite · firebase · flask · vercel · figma · git · and whatever the project demands honestly</sub>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="55%" />

</div>

<br>

### ✿ things i've shipped

<sub>not ideas in a notes app. these have commits, bugs, and stories behind them.</sub>

<br><br>

<table>
<tr><td colspan="2">

#### 🔮 &nbsp; [prism](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/Prism) &nbsp; <sub>— the big one</sub>

an ai-powered sap assistant that actually understands enterprise workflows instead of just wrapping
chatgpt around documentation. node backend + fastapi python service + react frontend. built different
from existing sap solutions because it reasons about business processes, not just keywords.

`express` · `fastapi` · `prisma` · `react` · `python` · `docker`

</td></tr>
</table>

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 🏭 &nbsp; [fm-demo](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/FM-demo)

production-grade food manufacturing erp.
full admin → manufacturer → retailer lifecycle.
materials, production batches, dispatch, invoicing,
commissions — the whole supply chain.

`nestjs` · `prisma` · `postgres` · `typescript`

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 🧠 &nbsp; [hivemind](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/hivemind)

distributed intelligence engine for real-time
truth, reasoning & insight. multi-source
information synthesis that doesn't hallucinate
(or at least tries really hard not to).

`node` · `react` · `docker`

</td>
</tr>
</table>

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 🎯 &nbsp; [zenith cortex](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/Zenith-Cortex)

ai career matching platform that actually
parses resumes, maps skills, and connects
students with recruiters. designed for scale,
not just a hackathon demo.

`react` · `node` · `ai/ml`

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 🪑 &nbsp; [queueless](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/QueueLess)

computer vision system that detects
available seats in real-time. built for
canteens and public spaces where you
waste 10 min looking for a chair.

`opencv` · `python` · `react`

</td>
</tr>
</table>

<br>

<details>
<summary>&nbsp; 🌼 &nbsp; <b>more things i've made</b> &nbsp; <sub>(click to unfold!)</sub></summary>
<br>

<div align="center">

| | project | what it is | built with |
|:---:|---------|-----------|:----------:|
| 🔍 | [**fakeye**](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/fakeye) | real-time misinformation detection with nlp stance analysis | `python` `nlp` |
| ✈️ | [**aero-sense**](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/Aero-sense) | drone navigation sim — gps vs quantum path comparison | `react` `leaflet` |
| 🎙️ | [**speaky**](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/Speaky) | voice-controlled browser assistant, no cloud needed | `react` `web speech api` |
| 💸 | [**devlance**](https://github.com/SnippetTechie/DevLance) | decentralized freelance marketplace with smart contract escrow | `solidity` `web3` |
| 🤚 | [**oscode-pc-1**](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/oscode-pc-1) | gesture control system using mediapipe hand tracking | `python` `mediapipe` |
| 💰 | [**eclipsex**](https://github.com/harpreet-2146/eclipseX) | expense tracker built with spring boot to flex oop | `java` `spring boot` |
| 📄 | **doclin** | financial document integrity verification engine | `fastapi` `sympy` |

</div>

</details>
